goal: Bring the >=1024px two-column layout from 'MeowTarot Reading Desktop.dc.html' (Frame A draw board + Frame B daily result) to the Daily/Question/Full card-draw boards and the Daily result page; mobile + iOS wrap byte-identical.
done: Additive @media(min-width:1024px) blocks only. DRAW BOARDS (daily.css/question.css/full.css): grid the .X-state--board (and .question-draw-shell) into a 352px left rail (deck+streak, title/hint, shuffle, counter, Continue CTA) plus a wide right column holding the dealt card grid at a larger size (daily 4-up, question 4-up, full 8-up); topbar spans full width; real card-back art unchanged. DAILY RESULT (reading.css, scoped to body[data-reading-mode='daily']): grid .daily-reading-stage so .panel--spread (full-res h900 card art + name + lucky-colour caption) is a sticky left rail and the interpretation/advice/related-links panels flow in a wider right column; dropped page-shell min-height to remove the dead gap and centred the Save/Share action-row. Page-shell widening is daily-scoped so Question/Full results keep their narrow column until their own desktop layouts land. KEY TECHNIQUE: row-gap:0 + grid-row:1/span 99 lets the tall column span all rail rows WITHOUT phantom row-gap inflation (span 60 + row-gap:16 had inflated the result page to 2077px). Card art is full webp (h900), never -200. Pure CSS so EN + TH both covered with no markup change.
verified: Real Chrome at 1440px: all three boards render two-column with larger card grids; daily result two-column (EN + TH, identical 372px 632px grid, page height 1197px, no gap); mobile (<1024px) confirmed display:block / single column (untouched).

goal: Finish the desktop (>=1024px) Reading Desktop design — add Question (3-card) + Full (Celtic Cross) result two-column layouts — and fix the homepage hero card-back art cropping to the wrong aspect ratio.
done: (1) HERO CROP FIX (css/desktop-home.css): .mtd-card had a fixed 188x280 (0.671) box but the real back art is 1568x2720 (0.576), so object-fit:cover cropped each card's own border (the zoomed 'P'). Set .mtd-card width + aspect-ratio:1568/2720 (and .mtd-card--c likewise), with .mtd-card--r (boba-oracle, true 848/1264) overriding -> zero crop on all three fan cards. (2) QUESTION RESULT (css/reading.css, scoped [data-reading-mode='question']): grid #reading-content (panels are direct children here, no stage wrapper) so the 3-card .panel--spread is a sticky left rail and recap/story/takeaway/energy/related flow right. (3) FULL/CELTIC RESULT (scoped [data-reading-mode='full']): grid into 1fr+460px so .panel--celtic-cross breathes in a wide sticky LEFT column, celtic-hero spans the top, summary/interpretation/integration/energy scroll in the 460px RIGHT column. Same row-gap:0 + grid-row:1/span 99 technique. Pure CSS, EN+TH both covered. Save/Share kept as a centred action-row (the design's mini-poster left-rail gateway needs a JS DOM move -> deferred). asset-resolver/poster untouched.
verified: Real Chrome at 1440px via draw-through (picked 3 / 10 cards then revealed): question result two-column; full result two-column EN + TH (grid 596px 460px, cross sticky, Thai 'สิบใบ สิบประตู'); homepage hero shows all three full backs uncropped; mobile (<1024px) confirmed display:flex / single column (untouched).
